title: Daily routine + reflexive verbs
objectives: Describe a daily routine in Spanish
Recognize and use basic reflexive verbs

vocab.es: me / te / se / nos / os / se

grammar_notes: Reflexive verbs have a -se on the infinitive: levantarse, ducharse. The action turns back on the subject.
Conjugate normally, and add the matching pronoun BEFORE the verb: yo me levanto, tú te levantas, él se levanta.
Russian uses -ся (одеваться, мыться) — same idea. The Spanish 'me/te/se' carries the same role as Russian '-ся'.
example_phrases: Me levanto a las siete. (I get up at seven.)
Se ducha por la mañana. (He/she showers in the morning.)
¿A qué hora te acuestas? (What time do you go to bed?)
